Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena

Class RdfStreamSerializer

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.Context
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingContextable
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingTraverseContext
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.Serializer
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.OutputStreamSerializer
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.RdfStreamSerializer
All Implemented Interfaces:
RdfMetaProvider, XmlMetaProvider
Direct Known Subclasses:
RdfProtoSerializer, RdfThriftSerializer
public class RdfStreamSerializer extends OutputStreamSerializer implements RdfMetaProvider
Stream-based RDF serializer for binary formats (RDF/THRIFT, RDF/PROTO).

Extends OutputStreamSerializer and delegates RDF metadata to an internal RdfSerializer.

Notes:
  • This class is thread safe and reusable.
See Also:
  • {doc jmr.RdfDetails}

    • copy

      public RdfStreamSerializer.Builder<?> copy()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Creates a builder from this context object.

      Builders are used to define new contexts (e.g. serializers, parsers) based on existing configurations.

      Overrides:
      copy in class Serializer
      Returns:
      A new Builder object.

    • createSession

      public RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder createSession()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Create a session builder based on the properties defined on this context.

      Use this method for creating sessions where you want to override basic settings. Otherwise, use Context.getSession() directly.

      Overrides:
      createSession in class OutputStreamSerializer
      Returns:
      A new session builder.
